confirmedHistories.identityCheck: Exact Japanese full-name match in HPA official Spring Ebetsu result PDF; birth year, affiliation, equipment division, and bodyweight-class context are consistent with the Numata G-group row recorded in PR #97.

reconciliationResult.interpretation: PR #97 remains the source batch for Lot 96-100. This run narrows the recheck to Lot 96 竹内 謙太 and confirms that the Spring Ebetsu equipped three-lift row is suitable for a future schema-safe database promotion, while keeping this run audit-only.
reconciliationResult.safeNextStep: Promote this confirmed Lot 96 EQ-PL row to data/database.json only with a script that preserves the minified JSON schema and source-link conventions. Do not infer any national, international, APF/AAPF, or record-status achievement from this row.
